meta.title: ItalianFabrics.uz — Premium Italian Textiles
meta.description: Premium Italian fabrics imported and distributed in Uzbekistan. Luxury, quality, heritage.

hero.subtitle: We import and distribute authentic premium Italian fabrics to Uzbekistan — sourced from renowned mills with centuries of tradition.

about.label: Who We Are
about.title: Italian Textiles, Here in Uzbekistan
about.p1: ItalianFabrics.uz brings premium Italian textiles to designers, tailors, and businesses across Uzbekistan.
about.p2: We work with established Italian manufacturers — many with histories spanning centuries — to offer fabrics that carry the quality and craftsmanship Italy is known for.
about.p3: Whether you're working on fashion, tailoring, or interior projects, we're here to connect you with genuine Italian materials.

services.label: What We Do
services.title: From Italy to Uzbekistan
services.subtitle: We handle sourcing and distribution so you can focus on your craft.

items.title: Italian Sourcing
items.description: We partner with textile manufacturers across Italy, selecting premium fabrics from factories with long-standing reputations for quality.

items.title: Premium Textiles
items.description: Our focus is on high-end fabrics — the kind used in fine tailoring, fashion, and luxury interiors.

items.title: Local Distribution
items.description: Based in Uzbekistan, we make it easier for local professionals to access authentic Italian materials.

items.title: Luxury
items.description: We focus on premium-grade fabrics — the standard Italy's textile industry is built on.

items.title: Quality
items.description: Every fabric we bring in is selected for its craftsmanship, durability, and finish.

items.title: Heritage
items.description: Italy's textile tradition goes back centuries. We carry that legacy into a new market.

whyItaly.label: Why Italy
whyItaly.title: The Home of Premium Textiles
whyItaly.p1: Italy has been at the heart of global textile production for centuries. From the silk traditions of the north to the wool mills of Piedmont, Italian fabrics are trusted by tailors and fashion houses worldwide.
whyItaly.p2: What sets Italian textiles apart is a deep respect for craft — combining time-honored techniques with modern quality standards. That is the standard we bring to Uzbekistan.

audience.label: Who We Serve
audience.title: Built for Creators & Professionals
audience.subtitle: If quality materials matter to your work, we're here to help.

items.title: Tailors & Ateliers
items.description: Bespoke suit makers and custom tailors who need fabrics that drape, cut, and finish to the highest standard.

items.title: Fashion Designers
items.description: Designers and brands looking for premium Italian materials for collections, samples, and production.

items.title: Interior Designers
items.description: Professionals sourcing luxury textiles for upholstery, drapery, and high-end interior projects.

items.title: Businesses & Retailers
items.description: Shops and companies that want to offer their customers genuine Italian quality.

process.label: How It Works
process.title: Simple & Straightforward
process.subtitle: Getting started is easy — just reach out and we'll take it from there.

steps.title: Get in Touch
steps.description: Send us a message about your project — what you're making, what kind of fabric you need, and any preferences you have.

steps.title: We Consult
steps.description: We'll discuss your requirements and recommend suitable options from our Italian suppliers.

steps.title: We Source
steps.description: Once you're happy with the direction, we handle sourcing and importing the fabrics from Italy.

steps.title: Delivery in Uzbekistan
steps.description: Your materials arrive locally — ready for your workshop, atelier, or project.

items.question: What types of fabrics do you offer?
items.answer: We focus on premium Italian textiles — including wools, silks, cottons, linens, and blends. Our range is growing. Contact us to find out what's currently available for your project.

items.question: Are all fabrics genuinely from Italy?
items.answer: Yes. Everything we supply is sourced directly from Italian manufacturers. Authenticity is at the core of what we do.

items.question: Can I request fabric samples?
items.answer: Absolutely. If you're working on a specific project, get in touch and we'll discuss sample options with you.

items.question: Do you deliver across Uzbekistan?
items.answer: Yes. We work with clients throughout Uzbekistan and can arrange delivery based on your location and order.

items.question: Do you have a physical showroom?
items.answer: We're based in Tashkent and happy to meet by appointment. Send us an email to arrange a visit or discuss your needs.

contact.label: Get in Touch
contact.title: We'd Love to Hear From You
contact.subtitle: Interested in Italian fabrics for your project? Reach out and we'll be happy to discuss how we can help.
